sacco.gui

Class Font

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.gui.Font

  • public class Font
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Font(java.awt.Font f) 
      Font(int fontSize)
      Creates a new Font of the given Font size
      Font(java.lang.String fontName, int fontSize)
      Creates a Font with the given Font name and size

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.awt.Font getFont()
      Not for student use.
      java.lang.String getFontName()
      Returns the current name of the Font object
      int getFontSize()
      Returns the size of the Font object
      boolean isBold()
      Returns true if the Font is currently Bold, false if not
      boolean isItalic()
      Returns true if the Font is currently Italic, false if not
      void setBold(boolean b)
      Sets the font to be bold or not according to the parameter of the method
      void setFontSize(int size) 
      void setItalic(boolean b)
      Sets the font to be italic or not according to the parameter of the method

      • Font

        public Font(java.lang.String fontName,
    int fontSize)
        Creates a Font with the given Font name and size
        Parameters:
        fontName - The name of the font "Arial" for example
        fontSize - The size of the Font
